CustomMetadata.label: GU-001 - Guest profile has Modify All Data

values.value: Guest profile has Modify All Data
An Experience Cloud guest profile has PermissionsModifyAllData=true. This means unauthenticated public internet users have full read/write/delete access to all org data.
Unauthenticated public internet users can read, edit, and delete all org data. This is the highest possible risk configuration for a Salesforce org with an active Experience Cloud site.
Remove PermissionsModifyAllData from all guest profiles immediately. Guest profiles should have zero standard permissions beyond object-read on explicitly public content objects.
